title: Managed Service for Apache Kafka API

gcp.managedkafka.projects.locations.list.description: Lists information about the supported locations for this service. This method can be called in two ways: * **List all public locations:** Use the path `GET /v1/locations`. * **List project-visible loc

required.description: The resource that owns the locations collection, if applicable.

produces_fields.note: resource identity — use as name/parent param for .get()

required.description: Resource name for the location.

gcp.managedkafka.projects.locations.clus.description: Returns the properties of a single cluster.

required.description: Required. The name of the cluster whose configuration to return.

can_come_from.note: [tier 1/exact] call gcp.managedkafka.projects.locations.clusters.list, iterate response["clusters"][], extract item["name"] → fill {clusterId}
